new: Better Value plan launched — 3 lines for $140/mo with Netflix, Hulu, Apple TV+, T-Satellite
iPhone 17 On Us for switchers — no trade-in needed on Experience Beyond or Better Value
Galaxy S26 Ultra On Us with new line on Experience Beyond
Home Internet Month On Us promo (code MONTHONUS) + up to $300 back via prepaid card
changed: Experience Beyond and Experience More plans replaced Go5G Plus and Go5G as the premium and mid-tier options
Home Internet All-In now includes mesh router for whole-home coverage

competitorUpdates.ATT: AT&T launched Unlimited Your Way 2.0 — stripped ALL streaming perks from every plan. Also raising legacy plan prices again in April 2026 ($10-20/mo increases).
competitorUpdates.Verizon: Verizon settled $100M class action over hidden Administrative & Telco Recovery Charge. Still requires trade-in for most best phone deals.

biggestThreat.why: AT&T Unlimited Your Way 2.0 is a simplified lineup that could appeal to price-conscious customers, despite stripping streaming perks. Their aggressive marketing may confuse customers into thinking they're getting a better deal.
biggestThreat.counterStrategy: Lead with the streaming value gap — AT&T just removed Netflix, Max, and Disney+ from all plans. T-Mobile includes Netflix, Hulu, and Apple TV+. That's ~$30/mo in value they lost. Plus the $3,700 savings stat over 5 years.

biggestOpportunity.description: iPhone 17 launch week with no-trade-in switcher deals + Better Value plan for families
biggestOpportunity.targetCustomer: AT&T and Verizon families (3+ lines) frustrated by price increases and lost streaming perks
biggestOpportunity.pitch: Free iPhone 17 — no trade-in. 3 lines for $140/mo with Netflix, Hulu, Apple TV+ included. AT&T just took all streaming away. We'll even pay off your old phones up to $800 each.

keyNumbersThisPeriod: $3,700 — amount T-Mobile families saved vs AT&T/Verizon over 5 years
$140/mo — Better Value plan price for 3 lines with all perks
$0 — trade-in required for iPhone 17 On Us switcher deal
$300 — max Home Internet rebate on All-In tier
